title: Typhoon World Foods Strawberry Bowl 12cm
features: STRAWBERRY BOWL | Bring strawberries and cream to life with the Typhoon World Foods Strawberry bowl. Beautifully hand-painted in a rich red with delicate yellow seeds and green leaves, it’s little wonder this fun bowl is a crowd favourite!

DURABILITY | Produced from ceramic and finished with a durable-coloured glaze, the bowl resists chipping and cracking withstanding the rigours of everyday use. Dimensions of one bowl: H6 x W12 x D12cm.
SIZE | With a generous capacity of 230ml, you can serve up an abundance of nibbles, small desserts and finger foods while adding a splash of colour to your dinner table or outdoor setting!
WORLD FOODS | The quality is in the detail. The World Foods range was designed for those who love to cook or serve dishes from around the globe.

DESIGNED TO INSPIRE YOUR HOME | Since 1991 we have been creating stylish collections to kit out your kitchen with the latest trends in homewares. We create beautiful ranges that focus on fashion as well as form.
description: Product Description Set of 2 Strawberry Bowls Set of 2 Watermelon Bowls Set of 3 Fajita Bowls Orange Bowl Avocado Bowl Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 5.0 out of 5 stars 12 — 5.0 out of 5 stars 12 3.4 out of 5 stars 5 3.8 out of 5 stars 21 Price — no data — no data £13.60 £ 13 . 60 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 £10.92 £ 10 . 92 Description Produced from ceramic and finished with a durable-coloured glaze, the bowls resist chipping and cracking withstanding the rigours of everyday use Featuring a watermelon design with a green embossed design on the outside and juicy red on the inside it makes serving snacks and dips practical and fun. The Avocado-shaped bowl is naturally designed to hold flavoursome guacamole, whilst the tomato-shaped bowl makes the perfect home for spicy salsas. Orange Bowl features an embossed orange design on the outside and a fun segment design on the inside. The bowl is designed and finished in the shape of an avocado and makes serving snacks and guacamole practical and fun.
